sections.heading: Biography
sections.content: Sam Ananias Cases is a Bachelor of Industrial Technology major in Computer based in Cebu, Philippines. He focuses on software engineering fundamentals, problem decomposition, web standards, and leveraging AI as an interactive development partner.

sections.heading: Philosophy
sections.content: I believe in building software thoughtfully—writing clear specifications, planning maintainable architecture, evaluating trade-offs, and verifying every build through rigorous automated testing.
